mnemonics: Clouds Are Universally On Demand Computing
Clouds Are Universal Open Large Distributed Engineering
keyPoints: Definition of Cloud Computing: a model for delivering computed services over the Internet.
Characteristics of Cloud Computing: Scalability, On-Demand Self-Service, Multi-Tenancy, Broad Network Access, and Resource Pooling.
Service Models of Cloud Computing: Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS), Platform as a Service (PaaS), and Software as a Service (SaaS).
Service Delivery Model of Cloud Computing: Public Cloud, Private Cloud, Community Cloud, and Hybrid Cloud.
Key Players in Cloud Computing: Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
